description: Water-source override for county/municipal water service via Etowah Water & Sewer.

step_overrides.description: Collect utility availability letters and connection requirements, including Etowah Water & Sewer capacity/tap requirements when applicable.

step_overrides.title: Complete county water service and meter setup (Etowah Water & Sewer)
step_overrides.description: Finalize municipal/county potable water service, meter, and service-line connection required for finals and occupancy.
